name: Date or Raisin Bran Muffins
recipeInstructions:
1. Finely chop pitted dates and substitute for the raisins to make Date Muffins.
2. Mix cereal with milk in a bowl until most of the milk is absorbed, stirring occasionally.
3. Grease 12 muffin cups with butter or non-stick cooking spray.
4. Preheat oven to 400 degrees F (200 degrees C).
5. In a medium-sized bowl, sift together flour, baking powder, salt, and sugar.
6. Add raisins and chopped walnuts; mix well.
7. Beat the egg in a separate bowl, then stir in the vegetable oil.
8. Pour the wet ingredients into the dry mixture and stir until just combined, ensuring no large lumps remain.
9. Fill each prepared muffin cup about halfway to two-thirds full with batter.
10. Bake for 30 minutes, or until golden brown and a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
11. Remove from the oven and serve hot with butter and jelly or preserves.
